reference: Minh & Makowski (2013) Biophys J 104:873, Table 1 (With SVD); analyze1site.m.
notes: Intensities are the paper's ion-chamber-calibrated, outlier-removed, beam-stop-truncated
D_all (MATLAB loadTable.m); the wide-angle region (1/d > 0.2) is excluded.
Reproduce with waxs_delta_g_posterior (a faithful port of analyze1site.m).
